utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Count the number of items in the required format. There are 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget.
Step 2: Count how many appear in the final coverage plan. All 5 items are present.
Step 3: Check if they are fully specified with all required details.
- health_coverage: Includes both physical and mental health insurance with clear costs per plan and total monthly/annual cost. ✅
- property_coverage: Mentions home/contents protection and lists cost — includes coverage details such as temporary accommodation and electronics up to €3000. ✅
- travel_coverage: Describes travel insurance coverage and provides monthly and annual costs. ✅
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services (age-based discounts) and cost information (“Included in premiums”). ✅
- total_budget: Complete monthly and annual breakdown is present. ✅
All items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the items in the final coverage plan.
- Health coverage (physical_health): VitalPlus Standard Plan (€95/month after discount)
- Health coverage (mental_health): LifeFirst Standard Plan (€62/month after discount)
- Property coverage: InsurePlus Standard Coverage (€58/month)
- Travel coverage: VitalPlus Standard Plan (€52/month)

Step 2: Match each item to the ground-truth ratings.
- VitalPlus Standard Plan (physical health) → Found in primary_health_coverage.physical_health.VitalPlus Standard Plan → rating 7
- LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) → Found in primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan → rating 9
- InsurePlus Standard Coverage → Found in property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage → rating 9
- VitalPlus Standard Plan (travel) → Found in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.VitalPlus Standard Plan → rating 7

Step 3: Compile the mapping of each plan in the final coverage plan to its rating.
